topic: Two people meet for the first time at a weekend farmers' market in a US city and strike up a friendly conversation
title: Meeting at the Farmers' Market

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: What a beautiful day for the market!

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: I know, the weather is perfect.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: Nice to meet you, Sarah. I'm Tom.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: Actually, I just moved here from Chicago last month.

translations.ko: 사실 지난달에 시카고에서 여기로 이사 왔어.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: Oh wow, welcome! I've lived here my whole life.

translations.ko: 오 진짜, 환영해! 난 여기서 쭉 살았어.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: That's cool. So what do you do for work?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: I'm a teacher at the local high school.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: Nice! I work in graphic design.

translations.ko: 좋네! 난 그래픽 디자인 일 해.
